comment: Animation-validator regression fixtures (card-anim-validators, 2026-07-07). Negatives are the REAL reverted garbage sheets extracted byte-identical from git history (blobs already existed in those commits, so re-adding them reuses the objects). Thresholds were calibrated on these full sheets; test_anim_validators.py drives this manifest and is wired into pnpm validate. knownLimitation entries are OWNED by the acceptance panel + eyes-on layer (integrator ruling 2026-07-07): their defects are geometric (plank-rotation death, anatomy garble), measured inseparable from live positives by motion/palette metrics; they stay here so a future motion-geometry recipe has calibration targets waiting.

fixtures.notes: Second half of the sheet is duplicate-tiled: adjacent deltas 1.4-2.0 across f03-f07.
Uniformly-high garble deltas, no arc: max/min 1.31 < 1.38 loop floor.
Flattest profile of the set: max/min 1.19.
Rotated-plank death: rigid whole-body rotation, palette-stable (L1 0.13), healthy motion magnitude (min delta 29.8, ratio 2.40). Calibration target for a future motion-geometry recipe.
Anatomy/pose garble (cape side flips frame to frame), palette-stable (L1 0.07), healthy motion magnitude (min delta 24.3, ratio 2.44). Calibration target for a future motion-geometry recipe.
Coherent anatomy, per-frame outfit morph: internal L1 0.83, vs B1 canon 1.08.
Loop ratio 1.44 sits in the 1.38-1.55 WARN band by design - passes with a loud warning.
The widest legitimate player palette swing (sword sweep): internal L1 0.43, canon L1 0.77.
Widest legitimate palette swing overall (whole-body squash/stretch): internal L1 0.64. No canon pair - cross-entity canon comparisons are invalid (measure 1.9+).
Loop ratio ~1.55 at the WARN band boundary; either WARN-pass or clean pass is acceptable.

opaqueRingComment: Foreign-hue opaque-ring gate fixtures (card-anim-opaque-ring-wiring, 2026-07-07). Drives fringe.py opaque_magenta_ring: the defective video-keyed swing must fire RED (dark-magenta despill ring with ZERO interior support, 826-962 px/frame), while B1 idle (dark-plum cel outline, foreign count <=19) and monster_blossom_slime (a legitimately-PINK subject whose body+outline hue is its own palette, count 0) must pass GREEN. The blossom slime is the calibration trap: a naive magenta-lean count would false-fail it. A still uses cell=null (whole image); a sheet passes its measured cell. If the defective ever stops FAILING or a positive starts FAILING here, the calibration regressed - do not silence it.
greenTealSpeckleComment: Lower-body green/teal video-key residue gate fixtures (card-p3-video-cast, 2026-07-08). Drives fringe.py green_teal_speckle: the rejected cast sheet must fire RED in the foot-band metric (dirty cast 431-507 px/frame in this checker), while accepted swing (0-6 px/frame) and B1 idle (0 px/frame) must pass GREEN at threshold 6. Full-silhouette counts are diagnostic only because accepted sheets carry legitimate teal costume/scarf pixels.
colorParityComment: Silhouette colour-parity gate fixtures (card-p3-cast-funnel-rebuild, 2026-07-08). Drives fringe.py color_parity: the palette-quantized+dithered cast sheet must fire RED on the value floor (whole-silhouette HSV value collapsed to 0.395 < 0.42; saturation is INFLATED to 0.626 by speckle so value carries the gate), while accepted B1 idle (0.661/0.537) and swing (0.673/0.531) pass GREEN. Floors are static, not a live canon compare, so a legitimately dimmer generation faithfully processed is not false-failed. If the destroyed sheet ever stops FAILING or a positive starts FAILING, the calibration regressed - do not silence it.
ditherNoiseComment: Dither-noise gate fixtures (card-p3-cast-funnel-rebuild, 2026-07-08). Drives fringe.py dither_noise: the dithered cast sheet must fire RED (sheet-median 2D luminance-oscillation density 4.489 > 3.5 floor), while accepted swing (1.85; one sword-sweep frame spikes to 4.796 but the median stays clean, proving the median aggregation) and B1 idle (2.482) pass GREEN. Sheets pass their measured --cell. If the destroyed sheet stops FAILING or a positive starts FAILING, the calibration regressed - do not silence it.
